name: domscribe
description: Domscribe is a pixel-to-code development tool that maps running UI elements to their exact source locations, capturing runtime context (props, state, DOM) for handoff to coding agents via MCP.

scripts.release:publish:local: nx run-many -t sync-dist && nx release publish --registry=http://localhost:4873
scripts.release:local: pnpm run build:all && pnpm run release:version:local && pnpm run release:publish:local
scripts.release:local:affected: pnpm run build:affected && pnpm run release:version:local && pnpm run release:publish:local
scripts.release:post-version: nx run sync-versions && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: release v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag "v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
scripts.release:patch: nx release version patch && pnpm run release:post-version
scripts.release:minor: nx release version minor && pnpm run release:post-version
scripts.release:major: nx release version major && pnpm run release:post-version
scripts.registry:publish: pnpm run build:all && pnpm run registry:publish:only
scripts.registry:publish:only: pnpm run release:version:local && pnpm run release:publish:local
scripts.pipeline:full: pnpm run registry:publish && pnpm run registry:install && nx run-many -t integration,e2e -p domscribe-test-fixtures
scripts.pipeline:e2e: pnpm run registry:publish && pnpm run registry:install && nx e2e domscribe-test-fixtures
